description_long: This is a visually striking, multi-tiered red cake presented within a decorative box that opens up to reveal the cake inside. The cake features three distinct layers, each adorned with evenly spaced white decorations and topped with several upright candles. The box is white with a festive pattern and a red ribbon motif, giving the impression of a gift or celebratory presentation. The interior flaps of the box fold outward, creating a platform around the cake and enhancing its display. The cake itself is round and symmetrical, with a smooth, glossy finish on the icing. The overall appearance is festive and elegant, suitable for special occasions such as birthdays or celebrations.
description: A three-tiered red cake with white decorations and candles, displayed inside an open, patterned gift box with a red ribbon motif.
description_view_0: Front view showing the cake centered inside the open box, with all three tiers and candles clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the layered structure of the cake and the depth of the box, with the cake's profile and candles in silhouette.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the closed back of the box with a red ribbon cross, concealing the cake from this angle.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, displaying the cake's tiers and the open box structure from the other side.
